displayTitle: Say the Word You Can Defend

beats.narration: In visual testing, the word you write is a claim about how far your process went. Let's calibrate three words that carry legal weight.

payload.title: SAY THE WORD
payload.sub: Each word in your report is a claim you must defend.

beats.narration: You notice something: an indication. Interpretation confirms a discontinuity. Only evaluation against the criteria can make it a defect.
Say defect too early and you've rejected hardware in writing. Say indication after evaluation and you've hidden a decision your reader needs.

payload.heading: The wrong word signs the wrong claim

beats.narration: So here's the rule: report the highest word you can defend — and not one rung higher. That report stands up to any auditor.
